topic: Learn how to use your mind to talk to ferns, cacti, and succulents.

modules.title: Module 1: The Fern Frequency
modules.module_context: Tuning your brainwaves to match the vibrations of indoor ferns.

submodules.title: 1.1 Staring intensely at leaves
submodules.content_context: A 40-minute exercise on how to stare at a leaf until it speaks.

submodules.title: 1.2 Apologizing to Cacti
submodules.content_context: How to say sorry to a cactus after bumping into it, using only alpha waves.
